outcome.text:
33.8.6 *Melandrium* (*Silene* p.p.)

PK 32–52 µm; 22–43 poriën; 4,5–6,0 µm. Exine 2,5–3,3 µm. *M. album* brochi 2,5–4,0 µm; *M. noctiflorum*/*rubrum* 1,5–2,5 µm.

*Melandrium album* (MILL.) GARCKE (4)
40,3–52,5 µm, MiW 47,9 µm; 50 PK, 1a

*Melandrium noctiflorum* (L.) FR. (2)
40,0–47,0 µm, MiW 43,9 µm; 50 PK, Oa

*Melandrium rubrum* (WEIG.) GARCKE (3)
32,0–40,3 µm, MiW 36,6 µm; 51 PK, 0a
